items.name_en: M25445 White Ostrich. Inspired by Louis Vuitton trunks, this Slim Trunk handbag features ostrich leather with riveted borders and a metal S-lock, showcasing an avant-garde rock style. The glossy chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering multiple carrying options. 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M24675 Black. The Noé BB bag belongs to the Nautical Capsule series, crafted from soft and durable Epi leather. Dimensions: 20×20×15cm

items.name_en: M24435 Fluorescent Green. This Speedy Bandoulière 25 Monogram Leather handbag is made of soft calfskin, recreating the sophisticated look of canvas prints with the Monogram pattern. Glowing metal hardware, lambskin lining, and a plaque together attest to Creative Director Pharrell Williams' relentless pursuit of details. 25 x 15 x 15cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M46963 Yellow - Creative Director Pharrell Williams reinterprets the Speedy Bandoulière 50 Monogram Leather bag with eye-catching, luxurious, and soft natural calfskin. He uses exquisite screen printing to embellish the Speedy with the Monogram pattern, recreating the twill texture of the Monogram canvas on the bag, creating a near-hand-painted blurred effect. 50 x 32 x 29 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_cn:
M47072 M47074
This Backup backpack is crafted from Monogram Empreinte calfskin leather, subtly featuring a Monogram embossed pattern. The detachable and adjustable shoulder strap allows for both single-shoulder and backpack carrying, while the top handle and braided chain offer options for hand-carry or crossbody.
20 x 22 x 14 cm
(Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M25413 Black Leather
items.name_cn:
M25413 Black Leather
This CarryAll Dark medium bag features a soft calfskin in a chic, relaxed silhouette, adding a standout look to 2024 SS runway styles. Polished metal hardware contrasts with a soft, tactile grained finish. Spacious enough for daily essentials, it's a perfect travel companion.
39 x 30 x 15 cm.
(Length x Height x Width)

Style: M24861
 This CarryAll Cargo small bag is crafted from soft calfskin with a stylish, soft-grained effect. Paired with polished metal hardware and a relaxed structure, it is a versatile choice for day and night. Detachable shoulder and chain straps allow for multiple styling options.
33.5 x 23 x 15 cm
(Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M23640 Full Leather Embossed Square Bag Collection New Fall/Winter ONTHEGO EAST WEST Handbag M23698 This OnTheGo East West handbag reinterprets the East West spacious structure with the OnTheGo small tote design, using Monogram Empreinte leather. Giant Monogram is embossed on the body, and the neat interior can hold daily essentials. Top handles and a detachable leather chain strap allow for multiple carrying ways. 25 x 13 x 10 cm.
